text:
601 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: فِي قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ: «۝ إِنَّ اَلصَّلاٰةَ كٰانَتْ عَلَى اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ كِتٰاباً مَوْقُوتاً ۝»
قَالَ «مَفْرُوضاً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.601 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said regarding the words of Allah (swt),: "Indeed, prayer has been decreed upon the believers a timed decree" (Surah An-Nisa 4:103).
Imam (as) said: "It means obligatory (prescribed)”.
